## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows project conventions (see `constitution.md §7`)
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode — no unjustified `any`
- [ ] Full type hints in Python
- [ ] Tests written or updated
- [ ] CI passes (lint + typecheck + tests)

### Privacy and Security
- [ ] No PII stored in plaintext
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
- [ ] Any data model change has received prior approval (or is approved here)

### SDIA Ethics
- [ ] The change maintains the "audit only your own accounts" principle
- [ ] Does not introduce scraping with authentication
- [ ] If adding a new platform: step-by-step validation guide is included
